title: podman build panics with SIGSEGV when passed a file instead of a folder
body:
**Is this a BUG REPORT or FEATURE REQUEST? (leave only one on its own line)**

/kind bug

**Description**

<!--
Briefly describe the problem you are having in a few paragraphs.
-->
`podman build` fails when it is called with a file instead of a directory.

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**

```
touch file
podman build file
```

**Describe the results you received:**
```
panic: runtime error: invalid memory address or nil pointer dereference
[signal SIGSEGV: segmentation violation code=0x1 addr=0x18 pc=0x153f973]

goroutine 1 [running]:
main.checkIfFileExists(0xc0001ec040, 0x1e, 0x2)
	cmd/podman/utils.go:74 +0x83
main.buildCmd(0x2bc5a80, 0x0, 0x0)
	cmd/podman/build.go:242 +0x178b
main.glob..func2(0x2b53fc0, 0xc0003668d0, 0x1, 0x1, 0x0, 0x0)
	cmd/podman/build.go:48 +0xde
github.com/spf13/cobra.(*Command).execute(0x2b53fc0, 0xc00003a0b0, 0x1, 0x1, 0x2b53fc0, 0xc00003a0b0)
	vendor/github.com/spf13/cobra/command.go:826 +0x473
github.com/spf13/cobra.(*Command).ExecuteC(0x2b5d0c0, 0x0, 0x0, 0x40ea00)
	vendor/github.com/spf13/cobra/command.go:914 +0x2f8
github.com/spf13/cobra.(*Command).Execute(0x2b5d0c0, 0x6, 0x192be95)
	vendor/github.com/spf13/cobra/command.go:864 +0x2b
main.main()
	cmd/podman/main.go:160 +0x63
```

**Describe the results you expected:**

An error message describing the correct usage of podman.

**Additional information you deem important (e.g. issue happens only occasionally):**

This issue also existed in buildah (https://github.com/containers/buildah/issues/1824) and was closed in containers/buildah@36dcedbabdd2a7312e84065dc0877389b2565a5e.

The segmentation fault happens in https://github.com/containers/libpod/blob/master/cmd/podman/utils.go#L74 when `IsDir()` is called but `file` is nil. Probably returning false when `err != nil` is sufficient to fix this.

**Output of `podman version`:**

```
Version:            1.6.3-dev
RemoteAPI Version:  1
Go Version:         go1.11.6
Git Commit:         9ba8dae0bfa5a5e894cf80e2ed114f6ca4bceb60
Built:              Wed Oct 30 19:46:46 2019
OS/Arch:            linux/amd64
```
